---
title: "Directive Fixture"
---

## Exercise 9.1
Base narrative.
```{r}
x <- 1
```
<!-- ADA:BEGIN lang=python mode=override kind=narrative -->
Python narrative override.
<!-- ADA:END -->
<!-- ADA:BEGIN lang=python mode=override kind=code -->
```{r}
x = 1
```
<!-- ADA:END -->
<!-- ADA:REQUIRES capability=fsaudit -->
```{r}
fs_audit()
```
